role.title: Senior Backend Engineer
role.description: We are looking for an experienced Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform team in Berlin. You will design and implement high-throughput microservices, own the API gateway, and mentor junior engineers.
role.role_summary: Own and evolve our core payment and data processing services, ensuring 99.9% uptime and sub-100ms p99 latency.
responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain high-throughput microservices in Go and Python
Own the API gateway layer (Kong/Envoy) and its observability stack
Collaborate with product and ML teams to deliver data pipelines
Review code, define coding standards, and mentor junior engineers
Drive incident response and post-mortems for platform incidents

legal.work_authorization: Must be authorized to work in the EU. Visa sponsorship available for exceptional candidates.

preferred_qualifications: Experience in fintech or payment processing
Open source contributions to backend infrastructure projects
Prior experience leading a team of 3+ engineers

benefits.description: Company pension scheme with 4% employer contribution
30 days vacation, flexible work hours, remote Fridays
Monthly team offsites, free lunch on Wednesdays

growth.career_path: Senior → Staff → Principal Engineer or Engineering Manager track
growth.mentorship: Paired with Principal Engineer for the first 3 months
growth.promotion_cadence: Annual review cycle with mid-year check-in

team.name: Platform Engineering
team.description: A team of 8 engineers responsible for the core platform, API infrastructure, and data pipelines. We value pragmatism, documentation, and blameless post-mortems.

process.decision_timeline: Offer within 3 business days of final interview

culture.eeo_statement: Acme Corp is an equal opportunity employer.
culture.employer_overview: Acme Corp builds the infrastructure layer for European SME payments. Series B, 200 employees, growing 3× YoY.
